steps.title: Use the success signals
steps.content: The program identified sidewalks in the vast majority of cases, could distinguish materials, and is described as already performing strongly. The blank must describe dependable success.

steps.title: Reject negative or unrelated adverbs
steps.content: A contradicts “vast majority” by saying the program seldom succeeded. C concerns speed, which is not discussed. D contradicts the strong-performance description. The fitting adverb means consistently and dependably. The answer is B.
